title: Oasis Trip Started!
description: The first stop of my Oasis trip is London, where we spent a few days exploring the city and finally have a chance to see Oasis in person.
coverAlt: Oasis reunion concert at Wembley Stadium with massive pink and yellow stage graphics and a crowd of fans

images.alt: Oasis performing at Wembley Stadium, giant pink and yellow 'Oasis' branding on stage screens with thousands of fans cheering
images.caption: Oasis at Wembley Stadium, the best concert I have ever been to.

images.alt: London skyline seen from the Thames, featuring the Walkie Talkie building and modern skyscrapers under a partly cloudy sky
images.caption: Skyline of London from Tower Bridge, my tutor said it is called "woki toki" building.
